_comment: spec-v12 Phase H.2 per-folder refresh cadence. One row per data/ folder naming the maximum age in days a shard's `asOf` may reach before the freshness lint warns. The cadence values map to the v12 §H.1 tiers (daily / weekly / monthly / quarterly / annual / event-driven). Kept in scripts/ rather than each manifest.json so the cadence schema can land without forcing a regeneration of every shard hash; future spec work may inline this into each manifest.
_schema: Each row: { folder: string, cadence: 'daily'|'weekly'|'monthly'|'quarterly'|'annual'|'event-driven', max_age_days: integer (2x the nominal cadence so a single missed window does not noise the lint), rationale: string }.

folders.rationale: NIST CODATA constants are physical facts. Recheck annually for new CODATA release announcements (next expected 2026 / 2027); the values themselves do not change.
NEC 3-year cycle (2023 current, 2026 next expected 2025-08). State adoption uneven; annual recheck for adoption-shift updates.
IPC / IFGC 3-year cycle (2024 current). Hazen-Williams / Manning / Joukowsky constants are physical.
ASHRAE 62.1 / 62.2 / 90.1 3-year cycle; IMC 3-year cycle; manufacturer P-T tables checked annually.
IICRC S500 / S520 stable; psychrometric constants are physical.
IRC / IBC / ASCE 7 / ACI / NDS multi-year cycles; lumber engineering properties stable.
NFA hose-friction (federal public-domain training material, stable); ISO PPC formulas stable.
Mixed: state sales-tax rates can change mid-year; IRS mileage rate annual; NIOSH stable. Quarterly captures the fastest-moving series.
Project-authored plain-English summaries; revised when source standards roll.
FMCSA 49 CFR 395 amended at irregular intervals (Federal Register watch); FMVSS / 23 CFR 658.17 stable.

BLS PPI / EIA / FRED federal series publish monthly. The shard manifest already enforces a 30-day-behind hard limit; the lint warn at 60 days catches a build that did not pick up the latest monthly release.
IRS Pub 946 / 15-T / Rev. Proc., SSA wage base, IRS standard mileage all roll annually each January.
Per-state codes are amended mid-year during state legislative sessions; quarterly recheck per spec-v6 §6.
IUPAC atomic weights revised every 2-4 years; CRC and Good 1966 buffer pKa stable; manufacturer rotor specs annual.
Project-authored glossary; revised on field-vocabulary additions.
Project-authored alias / companion shards (spec-v10 Phase D); revised on tile additions.
WMM2025 coefficients valid 2025-2030 (5-year cycle). The freshness lint already watches expires_on directly via sources-cycle.json; annual recheck is a soft warn for upstream-release awareness.
